mnemonics: S.T.R.U.C.T.U.R.E. your Test: Structure, Test cases, Review, Understand, Code, Time, Unexpected, Run, Evaluate
keyPoints: A test component validates the correctness and efficiency of a data structure implementation.
It includes test cases for common operations (insert, delete, search, update).
It should test edge cases (empty structure, first/last element, invalid input) to ensure robustness.
commonMistakes: Only testing with ideal, standard inputs and forgetting edge cases.
Not testing the time complexity (Big O) under large data volumes.
Failing to isolate and test individual methods, leading to unclear bug sources.
